special_mechanics.name: Rocket Pack Flight
special_mechanics.description: Armed rocket pack allowing short-distance flight

special_mechanics.name: Rolling Dash
special_mechanics.description: Short-distance rolling dash mechanic, noted as most notable gameplay addition from Genesis predecessor

special_mechanics.name: Energy Bolt Sword
special_mechanics.description: Sword weapon capable of firing energy bolts

tier_notes: Tier 2: Wikipedia source provides only qualitative gameplay descriptions. No quantitative physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, sub-pixel precision) are documented. Game mechanics are described functionally but without numerical specifications. Source references Genesis predecessor Rocket Knight Adventures but does not provide comparative physics data.
